src/test/java/edu/ucsb/cs156/kitchensink.general_idea: Add @ActiveProfiles annotation to ensure the test runs with the 'test' Spring profile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent to 2.6.2 to support Java 17 and access newer framework features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the project to compile and run using Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project targets Java 11, causing compatibility issues or failure to utilize Java 17 features/runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency for API gateway functionality.
Add spring-dotenv dependency to load environment variables from .env files.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java classes.
Add Springfox Boot Starter for Swagger API documentation generation.
Add Springfox Swagger UI dependency to serve the Swagger documentation interface.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to generate code coverage reports during the build.
Set default Spring profile to 'development' in the default Maven profile.
Add a 'production' Maven profile to configure production-specific settings and dependencies.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to the production profile to build the React frontend during the Maven build.
Add maven-antrun-plugin to the production profile to copy built frontend assets to the backend output directory.
Remove Flyway dependency as it is no longer used in this version of the project.

dev_environment.general_idea: Expose port 6006 in the Docker container to support Storybook development environment.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly set the MVC path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to avoid deprecation warnings and runtime errors in Spring Boot 3 / Spring Framework 6 which is required for Java 17+ modern stacks.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 (required for Java 17 LTS support in modern Spring) removes PathPatternParser as default and requires explicit configuration or migration to PathPatternParser; failing to configure this often leads to startup failures or deprecated API usage errors in the transition to Spring 6.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Disable the Open Session In View pattern to align with best practices and avoid lazy loading issues in newer Spring Boot versions.
Add Maven resource filtering placeholder for active Spring profiles to support environment-specific configurations.
Configure Google OAuth2 client registration with environment variable fallbacks for client ID and secret.
Add configuration property for admin emails with environment variable fallback.
Expose the mappings endpoint for Spring Boot Actuator management.
Configure the Swagger documentation path for API documentation.
Set Hibernate DDL auto mode to update to manage database schema changes automatically.
